overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a concrete drainage channel in Cyberpunk 2077, featuring graffiti-covered industrial walls, scattered trash piles, and hazy golden-hour lighting. The camera moves steadily forward through the channel, passing under a concrete bridge and alongside high-voltage transmission towers in a post-industrial wasteland environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete drainage channel with industrial walls and scattered debris

agents.ego_description: moving steadily forward through the drainage channel, approaching the distant bridge structure

entered.detail: large concrete utility pipes running along the left channel wall
tall vertical concrete wall with weathered surface and graffiti
sloped concrete embankment with trash accumulation at base
scattered garbage bags and debris accumulated against the left wall
large piles of black garbage bags and scattered refuse on the right slope
tall lattice steel electricity pylon with multiple power lines extending across the channel
massive concrete overpass structure spanning the channel in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a wide concrete drainage channel bathed in warm golden-hour light. Industrial pipes run along the graffiti-covered left wall while trash piles line both sides of the water-stained concrete floor. The camera advances steadily toward a distant concrete bridge, with a large power transmission tower visible against the hazy sky ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete bridge underpass with support pillars

events.description: approaching and entering the shadow of the concrete bridge overpass
moving directly under the bridge deck into darker shadowed lighting

agents.ego_description: passing beneath the massive concrete bridge structure, moving through the shadowed underpass

entered.detail: massive horizontal concrete bridge deck with circular drainage holes passing overhead
thick concrete columns supporting the bridge structure on the left side
thick concrete columns supporting the bridge structure on the right side

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches and passes beneath a massive concrete bridge that spans the drainage channel. The lighting shifts from bright golden-hour sun to shadowed darkness as the camera moves under the bridge deck. Support pillars frame the passage while the power transmission tower becomes visible on the right side through the bridge structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: open drainage channel continuing past the bridge with industrial ruins

events.description: exiting the bridge shadow back into open sunlight

agents.ego_description: continuing down the channel past the bridge, approaching the power transmission tower on the right

entered.detail: stacked rusted metal sheets and industrial debris against the left wall

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the bridge shadow back into warm sunlight, the channel continues with the massive power transmission tower now dominating the right side. The left wall shows corrugated metal debris and weathered graffiti, while the concrete channel stretches ahead toward distant industrial structures visible through the haze.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a concrete drainage channel that transitions from bright golden-hour light into deep shadow and back into a hazy industrial expanse. It begins by advancing through the wide channel, passing graffiti-covered walls and piles of trash while heading toward a distant bridge and a towering power transmission structure. As the camera reaches the bridge, the scene shifts from warm sunlight into the shadowed darkness beneath the massive concrete deck, where support pillars frame the passage. Emerging from the shadows back into the golden light, the camera reveals the transmission tower dominating the right side of the frame. The shot finally continues past corrugated metal debris and weathered walls, stretching toward distant industrial structures visible through the atmospheric haze.
